name: Air / Solo Soft-Shell Case
summary: Enhance your next journey with the Arizer Soft-Shell Case.
description: Enhance your next journey with the Arizer Soft-Shell Case. This sleek, unpadded case provides plenty of room to easily transport all essential items. The Soft-Shell Case accommodates the Arizer Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2 Vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
